items.description: Occurrence of sudden accidents, physical injuries, or bodily mishaps
Legal adoption of a child into the family
Marriage arranged by family, matchmakers, or traditional systems

Permanent wind-up, closure, or dissolution of business operations
Scaling up, opening new branches, or expanding existing business reach

Forming legal joint ventures or commercial partnerships with others

Inception, setup, and official launch of a new entrepreneurial venture
Acquisition and purchase of land, home, or commercial real estate
Periods of stagnation, demotion, layout, or loss of professional status
Significant positive trajectory, milestones, and success in one's profession
The birth of a child, bringing joy and expanding the lineage
Major milestones or status changes in a child's educational pathway
General life developments, status, and relationship with children within family

Deep development of contemplative routines, quietness of mind, or yoga practices
Fluctuations in mental health, peace of mind, anxiety management, or inner mental rest
